step_by_step_reasoning: We first parse the client's architecture starting from the source client lambda. Logs from client lambdas are streamed into Kinesis. From Kinesis, a transform Lambda function processes the logs into invocation records, reading and writing metadata state from DynamoDB. These processed invocation records go into a second Kinesis stream. This second Kinesis stream feeds two downstream paths: (1) a fast-query path using Lambda writing to Serverless Aurora, and (2) an analytical path where Firehose uses Glue schemas to convert records to Parquet format before storing them in S3, which is queried via Athena.

graph.name: Epsagon: Serverless Metrics and Log Observability Pipeline
graph.notes: Epsagon processes billions of client Lambda invocations monthly by ingesting and parsing logs into structured metrics. It uses a serverless architecture to automatically scale and control costs.

nodes.name: Client Lambda
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Monitored user lambdas generating logs.

nodes.name: Log Stream Kinesis
nodes.notes: Ingests streamed CloudWatch log groups from customer accounts.

nodes.name: Transform Lambda
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Transforms raw log lines into clean invocation records.

nodes.name: Metadata DB
nodes.notes: DATA_PEEK: Keeps track of customer functions, configs, and partial state.

nodes.name: Aurora Writer Lambda
nodes.notes: Writes invocation records to Aurora DB. Concurrency controlled by Kinesis integration to prevent Aurora overload.

nodes.name: Serverless Aurora
nodes.notes: DATA_PEEK: High-speed storage optimized for single point-in-time trace queries.

nodes.name: Firehose
nodes.notes: Batches incoming invocation records and converts JSON to Parquet.

nodes.name: Glue Data Catalog
nodes.notes: Provides table schema for Parquet conversion within Firehose.

nodes.name: Data Lake S3
nodes.notes: DATA_PEEK: Long-term storage of optimized Parquet records.

nodes.name: Athena
nodes.notes: Performs ad-hoc queries and builds aggregated metrics from S3.

edges.notes: Returns config and partial execution state
